items.briefing:
A DigiCert survey has found 81% of Australian organisations have experienced AI-related security incidents or vulnerabilities, highlighting that AI tools are creating real risks right here at home. Separately, a healthcare provider called Partnered Health has confirmed a cyber incident affecting patient information across its national clinic network — a reminder that sensitive personal data held by any organisation, including training providers, remains a prime target.

Attackers are also using hidden text in emails to trick AI-based spam filters, meaning suspicious emails may slip through undetected. **Practical tip:** Don't rely solely on your email filter — if a message feels unexpected or asks you to click a link, verify it directly with the sender before acting.

featured.title: DigiCert survey finds 81% of Australian organisations hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities
featured.quote: 81% of Australian organisations already experiencing AI security incidents shows urgent need for action.
